title: allophyllum divaricatum
intro: Allophyllum divaricatum, also known as pine midget or spreading leaf penstemon, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allophyllum divaricatum include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation and pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
